SocialHub.title: Gidan Watsa Labarai
SocialHub.subtitle: Sarrafa hanyoyin sadarwarka da sakonninka.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Haɗa shafukanka da asusunanka na sana'a don yin rubutu kai tsaye. Tabbatar cewa asusunka na Instagram na sana'a yana da alaƙa da shafin Facebook.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Haɗa asusunka na TikTok don tsara jadawalin da buga bidiyo kai tsaye.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Haɗin kai tsaye tare da Instagram da TikTok yana ci gaba da haɓakawa da amincewar dandamali (Beta na Keɓaɓɓu). Za a fitar da fasalin ga jama'a nan ba da jimawa ba.

LandingPage.hero_description: Kowane kyaftin yana buƙatar kamfas. Ba kayan aiki warwatse ba. RiveHub yana haɗa ayyukanka, yana kare ribarku, kuma yana kewayawa ma'aikatan ku ta cikin hargowar sabis na yau da kullun.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Kyakkyawan kicin ɗin cin abinci tare da ƙungiyar a sabis
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: AI tana nazarin rajistan zafin jikinka kuma tana ba da shawarwari don rashin daidaituwa, don ƙungiyar ku ta tabbatar.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Karanta bayanan ma'aikatan falon ku da hankali.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: Ƙirar tana daidaitawa nan take zuwa harshen asali na tawagar kicin ɗinku.
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Rubutun halitta na kyakkyawan gidan abinci na cin abinci na ciki
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Gudanar da gidan abinci a yau yana kama da tuƙa jirgin ruwa ta cikin hazo — ba tare da kayan aiki ba, kuna tsammani.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: RiveHub shine kamfas ɗin da ke mai da rashin tabbas zuwa gyaran hanya.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: RiveHub baya maye gurbin ƙwarewarku — yana ƙara shi da bayanai kuma yana watsa shi ga kowane memba na ma'aikata a cikin harsuna 25. Babu shinge a cikin jirgin.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_title: Zubar da riba a cikin ruwa mai wuya
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Kowane ɓataccen bayanan shine ɓarna a ƙarƙashin layin ruwa. Sonar na RiveHub yana bayyana shi kafin ku ɗauki ruwa.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Yayin da kuka daidaita, ƙarin jirgin ku yana koyon ruwan. Hankalinku ne — ba namu ba.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Kowace rana ba tare da bayanai ba sharar gida ce da ba a gani.
LandingPage.hero_borderless_hook: Ana samun sa a cikin harsuna 25
LandingPage.calculator_title: Nawa ne rashin tabbas ke kashe ku?
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Ƙididdige farashin yawan samarwa ba tare da amintattun bayanai ba.
LandingPage.social_proof_banner: An tsara shi don kyawawan gidajen cin abinci a Quebec
LandingPage.protocol_desc: IQ na kicin ɗinku yana ƙaruwa tare da kowane haɗi.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Buga maɓalli ɗaya, kuma RiveHub za ta fara koyon tafiyarka.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Tattaunawar tallace-tallace ta baya ta zama hasashen kowane abu.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: Sakan 30 na amsa a kowace rana kuma tsarin ka ya kai ga daidaito na 92%.
LandingPage.footer_desc: Hankali na Algorithms don gidajen cin abinci na gastronomic.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Duba matsatsin kuma a motsa naman nan da nan.
LandingPage.features_card2_alert: An gano gaggawa: Firjin nama a 8°C.
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_title: Saitin Zamani Mai Zuwa. (Mai amfani da Hankali).
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Gano sabbin kayan aikinmu guda huɗu don sarrafa gidan abinci mara wahala.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_title: 1. Mai Gina HACCP Ba Tare da Lambar Ba
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Gina samfuran binciken ku da kanku tare da dannawa. Tsaron abinci na al'ada, wanda aka sanya hannu a dijital kuma ba zai canza ba.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: Dashboard na Chef. Bibiyar bincike, gano matsalolin kicin da haɓaka horar da brigade ɗin ku da kallo ɗaya.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Kuna da takardar kuɗi? Ɗauki hoto. Claude AI nan take yana cire yawa, farashi da kayan abinci. Bankwana shigar da bayanai da hannu.
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Rubuta bayanan shirye-shiryen ku da umarnin ku. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (mai sauri, harsuna biyu) yana rubutawa kuma yana rarraba muku ga duk ƙungiyar.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Manta da littattafan rubutu marasa kyau. AI tana tsara mika wuya na ma'aikata, guguwar kayan aiki, da abubuwan da suka faru na fasinja.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Rubuta guguwa ta kayan aiki (misali, "Firiji 2 yana zubowa, an kira makaniki").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Bada umarni mai kyau na kewayawa ga ma'aikatan maraice.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: Bibiyar abubuwan da suka faru na fasinja (bako) don daidaita hanya.
LandingPage.f2_title: A Koyaushe A Shirye Don Bincike — Sararin Sama A Gabanka
LandingPage.f2_desc: Littafin log ɗin ku, mai sarrafa kansa. Daga yanayin zafin firiji zuwa man soya, RiveHub yana bin diddigin kowane karatu kuma yana tutar rashin daidaituwa kafin su zama reefs masu tsabta.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Firiji ya kai 8°C: shawara don gyara "Ware ko jefar da abinci mai haɗari".
LandingPage.f2_ex2: Tuna kai tsaye don duba man soya.
LandingPage.f2_ex3: An rubuta hanyoyin HACCP idan akwai bincike.
LandingPage.f3_desc: Babu matsalar harshe a cikin jirgin. Kowane ma'aikaci yana samun damar shiga gada da bayanan shigarwa a cikin harshensu na asali.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Shugaban dafa abinci yana rubutu da Spanish, mai wanke-wanke yana karantawa da Bengali.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Katin girke-girke nan da nan duk sabbin ma'aikata sun fahimta.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: An sami hanyoyin aminci ba tare da la'akari da asalin ma'aikacin ba.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Yana haɗuwa da tsarin POS ɗin ku: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: Radar Ribar ku yana haɗuwa da POS ɗin ku don yin la'akari da yawan tallace-tallace tare da farashin kaya a ainihin lokaci.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Shigo da tallace-tallace kai tsaye daga Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, ko Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Gano jita-jita "Stars" da "Rocks" tare da Matrix mai wayo.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Tsarin da bai dace ba? RiveHub AI yana nazari kuma yana shigo da kowane fitarwa na CSV ta asali.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Dakatar da shigar da kaya da hannu. AI yana cire kayayyaki, yawa, da farashi daga takardun isar ku don kiyaye ginshiƙan ku daidai.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Ɗauki hoton daftarin kaya mai lalacewa na mai kaya akan kawowa.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Cikakken layi-layi cirewa da faɗakarwa masu canza farashi don kayan abinci.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Kai tsaye kuma ta atomatik sabunta Kudin Abincin girke-girkenku.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Jawo sabbin abokan ciniki tare da sakonnin da ke dauke da abubuwan jan hankali na abincin ku da aka kirkira a dannawa daya.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Ƙirƙirar taken da ke jan hankali don menu na Ranar soyayya tare da cikakkun emojis.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Fassara sakonninku ta atomatik don jawo hankalin abokan ciniki na duniya.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Tsara bayanin jaraba don dandamalin isar da sako (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Aiki tare da duk fasinjoji masu shigowa daga Libro, Resy, da Zenchef. Webhooks da zabe ta atomatik don ƙidayar kai ta ainihin lokaci.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Karɓi ajiyar wuri ta kan layi nan take ba tare da shigarwa da hannu ba.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Haɗa baƙi masu zuwa, sokewa, da waɗanda ba su nuna a cikin ra'ayi ɗaya na tsakiya ba.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Yi la'akari da bayanan abokin ciniki don tsammanin ƙimar sabis ɗin ku.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Binciken Sonar yana haɗa fasinjojin ku masu zuwa, yawan tallace-tallace, da taswira don samar da shirin shiri ta atomatik.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Ƙididdige rabo ga kowane tasa bisa ga ainihin fasinjoji da aka tabbatar.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Haɗa dukkan kayan abinci da ake buƙata don tsira daga balaguron da ke tafe.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Kimanta jimlar kuɗin kaya kafin ma a ɗaga jirgin.
LandingPage.f1_mock_entry1: Firiji 2 yana zubowa, an kira mai gyara
LandingPage.f2_mock_action: Aiki: Watsar da abinci mai haɗari
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Gano menu na musamman na yau da dare! Tumatir mai launin shuɗi mai cikakken daɗi... ✨ Ajiyar wuri a cikin bio 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Tabbataccen jiki da yanayin muhalli don tsara ayyukanku na yau da kullun.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Radar ɗin Ribar ku don tsara hanyoyi da fa'idodi masu fa'ida.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Zurfin Yanayin Ribar tare da hasashe don tuƙa jirgin ruwa da kansa.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Daidaitaccen bibiyar ruwa. Gudanar da amfanin keg, bin diddigin ajiyar gilashi daban, da sarrafa cikakken samar da micro-giya na samar da kanban.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Nan take keɓance kwalba da ajiyar keg daga Kudin Abincinku na gaskiya.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Bibiyar ainihin asarar zuba (bambanci) tsakanin tallace-tallace na POS da ƙididdigar kayan aiki na zahiri.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Gudanar da gungun giya daga fermentation zuwa kegging tare da takamaiman yawan amfanin ƙasa.
LandingPage.res_mock_last_sync: AN YI MANYANAR KARSHE: minti 2 da suka wuce
LandingPage.f10_desc: Karanta matsa lamba na sararin samaniya akan sama. Ana ganin amfani da wutar lantarki da ruwa kowane wata don haka zaku iya yanke jirgin ruwa kafin lissafin ya faɗi.
LandingPage.f10_ex1: Bibiyar yanayin amfani da wutar lantarki na kowane wata.
LandingPage.f10_ex2: Sanya ido kan bambance-bambancen amfani da ruwa.
LandingPage.f11_desc: Ra'ayin idon ungulu na kwararar tattalin arzikin ku da algorithms masu ƙarfi don haɓaka ribar ku. RiveHub yana ƙetare kowane dalar Amurka da ke shigowa da kowane gram da ke fita.
LandingPage.f11_ex1: Ainihin lokacin da aka kiyasta ribar riba mai tsafta.
LandingPage.f11_ex2: Harkokin hulɗa na shigowa da fita.
LandingPage.f11_ex3: Rushewar granular na farashi don gano matsaloli.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.

Pricing.f5_desc: Dakatar da shigar da invoices da hannu. AI yana fitar da abubuwa na layi, samfura, da adadi dalla-dalla don sabunta farashin ku na net.
Pricing.f5_ex1: Ɗauki hoton invoice ɗin da aka murƙushe na mai kaya akan isarwa.

Pricing.f8_ex2: Haɗa albarkatun ƙasa da ake buƙata don tsira daga balaguron da ke tafe.
Pricing.f8_ex3: Kimanta jimlar kuɗin kaya kafin ma a ɗaga jirgi.

CGU.title: Sharuɗɗan Sabis — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: RiveHub dandamali ne na software-a-matakin-sabis (SaaS) wanda aka tsara don **taimakawa** masu gidajen abinci, manajoji, da ƙwararrun masana'antar abinci a cikin ayyukansu na yau da kullun ta hanyar kayan aikin da AI ke sarrafawa da fahimtar da ake samu daga bayanai. Ana iya samun sabis ɗin a **rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: Dandamali yana bayarwa, a tsakanin sauran abubuwa, fasaloli masu zuwa:
CGU.s1_l1: **Littafin rubutu na dijital** — Shigar da bayanan sabis ta hanyar AI, rarrabuwa ta atomatik, gano gaggawa, da shawarwarin matakan gyara
CGU.s1_l2: **Kula da zafin jiki** — Rikodi, nazarin yanayi, da shawarwarin matakan gyara da suka dace da HACCP
CGU.s1_l3: **Gudanar da menu** — Ƙirƙirar menu, gyarawa, da bugawa tare da samar da lambar QR da ƙaramin shafin jama'a
CGU.s1_l4: **Nazarin farashin abinci** — Ƙididdigar ribar da aka sarrafa ta atomatik ga kowane abinci, gudanar da kayan abinci da masu kaya, bin diddigin farashi, da faɗakarwar riba
CGU.s1_l5: **Injiniyan menu** — Rarrabuwa ta BCG-matrix na abubuwan menu (Tauraro, Anka, Drift, Dutse) tare da shawarwarin dabarun da AI ta samar
CGU.s1_l6: **Karɓar rasit da digitization na invoice (OCR)** — Ƙirar hangen nesa ta AI don ciro bayanai daga rasit da invoices
CGU.s1_l7: **Jerin shirye-shirye masu wayo** — Samarwa ta atomatik bisa ajiyar wuri, bayanan tallace-tallace na tarihi, da girke-girke
CGU.s1_l8: **Gudanar da ajiya** — Daidaita dandamali da hasashen yawan baƙi
CGU.s1_l9: **Cibiyar sadarwar zamantakewa** — Samar da abun ciki na AI don Instagram, Facebook, da TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Bambanci da bin diddigin asara** — Kwatanin ka'ida vs. ainihin, takardun ɓarna, da matakan gyara
CGU.s1_l11: **Ajiya da bin diddigin kudaden shiga** — Rikodin kudaden shiga na yau da kullun da sasantawa da banki
CGU.s1_l12: **Dashboard na lissafi (Le Nid)** — Hankali na kuɗi, kimanta ribar gabaɗaya, da hoton kwararar kuɗi
CGU.s1_l13: **Bayanin farashin amfani** — Kula da amfani da wutar lantarki da ruwa
CGU.s1_p3: RiveHub **kayan aiki ne na tallafawa yanke shawara**. Ba ya maye gurbin hukuncin ƙwararru, ƙwarewar ɗan adam, ko wajibcin tsari na mai amfani a ƙarƙashin kowane yanayi.
CGU.s2_p1: A cikin waɗannan sharuɗɗan, kalmomin masu zuwa suna da ma'anoni da aka tsara a ƙasa:
CGU.s2_d1_def: Dandamalin RiveHub da ake samu a rivehub.com, gami da duk fasalolin sa, APIs, da aikace-aikacen da ke da alaƙa.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Kowane mutum na halitta ko na doka wanda ya ƙirƙiri asusu akan dandamali kuma ya karɓi waɗannan sharuɗɗan.
CGU.s2_d3_def: Ginin sabis na abinci wanda mai amfani ya yi rajista a cikin Sabis, wanda ya zama babban wurin aiki.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Samfurin harshe (LLM) da fasahar ƙirar hangen nesa da masu samar da ɓangare na uku suka bayar (musamman Anthropic / Claude), waɗanda aka haɗa cikin Sabis don nazari, samar da abun ciki, da cire bayanai.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Duk wata alaƙa tsakanin Sabis da wani dandamali na waje (tsarin POS, dandamali na ajiya, hanyar sadarwar zamantakewa) ta hanyar APIs ko webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Gane haruffa na gani — fasaha don cire rubutu da bayanai daga hotunan takardu.
CGU.s2_d7_def: Duk wani bayani da mai amfani ya shigar, ya shigo da shi, ko kuma ya samar da shi a cikin Sabis ɗin, wanda ya haɗa da rubuce-rubuce, jerin abinci, girke-girke, hotuna, ma'amaloli, da tsare-tsare.
CGU.s2_d8_def: Wani alama ta lambobi da ke nuna matakin daidaitawa da cikakken bayanan gidan abincin a cikin dandamali.
CGU.s3_title: 3. Samun dama, Rijista, da Gudanar da Ƙungiya
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Samun dama ga Sabis ɗin yana buƙatar ƙirƙirar asusu tare da ingantacciyar adireshin imel. Mai amfani ya yarda ya ba da sahihan bayanai kuma ya kiyaye su daidai.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: Mai amfani shi kaɗai ke da alhakin kiyaye takardun shiga sirri. Duk wani aiki da aka gudanar a ƙarƙashin asusun Mai amfani ana ɗaukar an yi shi ne ta Mai amfani. Idan akwai wani zargi na lalacewa, Mai amfani dole ne ya sanar da RiveHub ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: Mai asusun zai iya gayyatar membobin ƙungiyar don shiga wurin aikin gidan abincin. Matsayin da ake da su sune:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Mai shi** — Cikakken dama, gudanar da biyan kuɗi, gayyata da cire mambobi
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Manaja** — Samun dama ga na'urorin aiki da tsarin gidan abincin
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Mamba na ƙungiya** — Karanta da shigar da dama bisa ga na'urori masu aiki
CGU.s3_s3_p2: Mai asusun yana da alhakin ayyukan da membobin ƙungiyar ke yi a cikin Sabis ɗin.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: Ana ba da gwaji na kyauta na kwanaki 14 ba tare da katin kuɗi ba. Bayan wannan lokacin, ana buƙatar biyan kuɗi don ci gaba da amfani da fasalulluka na musamman. Ana riƙe bayanan da aka shigar yayin gwajin.
CGU.s4_p1: RiveHub yana ba da damar haɗawa da sabis na waje don haɓaka iyawarsa. Mai amfani ya yarda cewa waɗannan haɗin gwiwar sun dogara ne akan sabis da ƙungiyoyi na uku masu zaman kansu ke sarrafa su.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Sabis ɗin yana goyan bayan daidaitawa tare da tsarin POS masu zuwa:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Ana amfani da bayanan ma'amala da aka shigo da su ta hanyar waɗannan haɗin gwiwar don nazarin farashin abinci, injiniyan menu, da hasashen shiri.
CGU.s4_s2_p1: Sabis ɗin yana daidaita ajiyar wurare daga:
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Ana amfani da bayanan ajiyar wuri don hasashen adadin baƙi da samar da jerin shirye-shirye.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Sabis ɗin yana ba da damar haɗawa zuwa dandamali masu zuwa don buga abun ciki:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: Mai amfani yana ba da izinin RiveHub don buga abun ciki a madadin su kawai bayan amincewa bayyananne ga kowane bugu.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: RiveHub ba za a ɗauki shi da alhakin katsewa, canje-canjen API, kuskuren bayanai, ko rashin aiki da ake dangantawa da sabis na ɓangare na uku ba. Mai amfani yana da alhakin kiyaye ingantattun takardun shiga haɗin gwiwa da tabbatar da daidaiton bayanan da aka daidaita.
CGU.s5_s1_p1: Sabis ɗin yana haɗa fasahohin wucin gadi (LLM da samfuran hangen nesa) waɗanda masu samar da ɓangare na uku ke bayarwa (Anthropic / Claude). Ana amfani da waɗannan fasahohin don:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Bincika da rarraba bayanan sabis na littafin rubutu
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Ba da shawarar matakan gyara lokacin da aka gano rashin daidaituwa (yanayin zafi, ayyuka)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Fassara abun ciki a cikin harsunan da ake tallafawa (harsuna 25)
CGU.s5_s1_l4: Cire bayanai daga hotunan rasit da daftari (OCR)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Samar da abun ciki na rubutu da taken kafofin sada zumunta
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Ƙirƙiri jerin shirye-shirye bisa ga bayanan tarihi da na hasashe
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Bincika farashin abinci da ribar riba
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Kimanta alamomin kuɗi a cikin dashboard na lissafi
CGU.s5_s2_title: 5.2. Ƙuntatawa akan garantin fitar da AI
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Shawara, nazari, da abun ciki da aka samar ta hanyar basirar ɗan adam da aka haɗa cikin RiveHub an bayar da su ne don dalilai na bayanai da nuni kawai.** Mai amfani ya yarda kuma ya karɓa cewa:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: Shawarwarin AI **ba su zama shawarwari na ƙwararru ba** a cikin batutuwan tsaron abinci, bin doka, lissafi, lafiyar jama'a, ko wani horo.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: Shawarwarin AI **ba su maye gurbin** hukuncin ƙwararren mai cancanta (mai duba lafiya, ƙwararren akawu, ƙwararren abinci).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: AI na iya samar da **sakamaƙo mara daidai, cikakke, ko kuma wanda bai dace ba** saboda yanayin yuwuwar samfuran harshe.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Nauyin ƙarshe na duk yanke shawara na aiki** - gami da gyare-gyaren matakai, yanke shawara na kuɗi, wallafe-wallafen abun ciki, da matakan bin doka - **ya rataya ne kawai ga Mai amfani**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: RiveHub **baya bada tabbacin bin doka** na kafuwar. An tsara Sabis ɗin don *sauƙaƙe* gudanarwa, ba don tabbatar da shi ba.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Tabbatar da kuma inganta** duk shawarwarin da AI ta samar kafin amfani da su ga ayyuka
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Kada a dogara gaba ɗaya** akan shawarwarin AI don yanke shawarar da ke shafar tsaron abinci, lafiyar jama'a, ko matsayin kuɗi na kafuwar
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **A kiyaye ƙwarewar tsari da horo** da ake buƙata ga ma'aikata, ba tare da la'akari da amfani da Sabis ba
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Bayar da rahoto** ga duk wata shawara da ba ta dace ba ko mai haɗari ga ƙungiyar RiveHub ta hanyar fom ɗin tallafi
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Ana ba da fassarar da AI ta samar don tunani kawai. RiveHub baya bada tabbacin daidaito, cikakke, ko dacewa na fassarori, musamman don sadarwa masu alaƙa da aminci. Ana ƙarfafa masu amfani da su su tabbatar da mahimman umarni ta hanyar ƙwararren ɗan asalin ƙasar.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Bayanai da aka ciro ta atomatik daga hotuna (rasit, daftari) na iya ƙunsar kurakurai. Mai amfani yana da alhakin tabbatar da daidaiton adadi, kwanakin, sunayen mai kaya, da sauran bayanan da aka ciro kafin haɗa su cikin lissafi ko ayyuka.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: Makin Intelligence alama ce ta ciki da ke nuna cikakken bayanan da aka shigar a cikin Sabis. Ba ya zama ainihin ma'aunin aiki na kafuwar kuma bai kamata a fassara shi a matsayin bincike ko ƙwararren ƙima ba.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: Sabis ɗin yana gudanar da ayyuka na atomatik na lokaci-lokaci, gami da:
CGU.s5_s7_l1: Daidaita ajiyar wuri daga dandamali da aka haɗa
CGU.s5_s7_l2: Ƙirƙirar jerin shirye-shiryen yau da kullun
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Aika faɗakarwar riƙewa da sanarwar aiki
CGU.s5_s7_p2: Waɗannan automations suna gudana a bango kuma sabis na ɓangare na uku na iya shafar su. Mai amfani bai kamata ya dogara kawai akan sakamakon atomatik ba tare da tabbatarwa ba.
CGU.s5_s8_title: 5.8. Abubuwan da ke cikin kafofin watsa labarun
CGU.s5_s8_p1: Zaƙun bayanan da aka samar ta hanyar AI (captions, hashtags, formatting) shawarwari ne da ke buƙatar sake dubawa na Mai amfani kafin bugawa. RiveHub ya ƙi duk wani abin alhaki na abun ciki da Mai amfani ya buga a kafofin watsa labarun, koda kuwa Sabis ɗin ne ya fara ba da shawarar.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: RiveHub yana tattarawa da sarrafa bayanan sirri bisa ga Dokar Kare Bayanan Sirri da Takardun Lantarki ta Kanada (PIPEDA), Dokar Quebec mai girmamawa ga kare bayanan sirri a cikin kamfanoni masu zaman kansu (Dokar 25), kuma, inda ya dace, Ƙa'idar Kare Bayanai ta Tarayyar Turai (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: Sabis ɗin yana tattarawa da sarrafa nau'ikan bayanai masu zuwa:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Bayanan ganowa** — Suna, adireshin imel, bayanin kafuwa
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Bayanan aiki** — Bayanan sabis, karatun zafin jiki, menus, girke-girke, sinadaran
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Bayanan kuɗi** — Kudin sinadaran, gefuna, adibas, kudaden shiga na yau da kullun, daftarin aiki na digitized
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Bayanan ajiyar wuri** — Ƙararrawa, ramukan lokaci, ƙimar soke (wanda aka daidaita daga dandamali na ɓangare na uku)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Bayanan ma'amala** — Tallace-tallace ta abu, hanyoyin biyan kuɗi (wanda aka daidaita daga tsarin POS)
CGU.s6_s2_l6: **Bayanan amfani** — Karatun mitar lantarki da ruwa
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Bayanan asara** — Bayanan bambance-bambance, sharar gida, da rashin daidaituwa na kaya
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Abubuwan multimedia** — Hotunan jita-jita, rasit da hotunan daftari
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Bayanan amfani** — Mu'amala ta sabis, zaɓin harshe, rajistan shiga
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Ana adana Bayanan Mai amfani amintacce akan kayan aikin gajimare na Supabase (Amazon Web Services). An rufa bayanan a hutawa da kuma kan hanya. Ginin haya da yawa yana tabbatar da keɓewar bayanai tsakanin gidaje.
CGU.s6_s4_title: 6.4. Canja wuri zuwa masu samar da AI
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Ana watsa wasu bayanai zuwa sabis na AI na ɓangare na uku (Anthropic) don sarrafawa (binciken bayanin kula, OCR, ƙirƙirar abun ciki). RiveHub ya himmatu don rage bayanan sirri da aka watsa kuma yana amfani da bayanan da suka dace kawai don sarrafa da ake buƙata. Waɗannan canja wurin suna ƙarƙashin manufofin sirri na masu samar da abin da ya dace.
CGU.s6_s5_title: 6.5. Bayanan haɗin gwiwa na ɓangare na uku
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Bayanan da aka daidaita daga tsarin POS, dandamalin ajiya, da hanyoyin sadarwar zamantakewa suna gudana ta hanyar APIs na waɗancan sabis ɗin. RiveHub kawai yana samun damar bayanan da suka dace don aiki da na'urorin da aka kunna kuma baya adana takardun shaidar biyan kuɗi na ƙarshen abokan cinikin gidajen abinci.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: Dangane da dokokin da suka dace, Mai amfani yana da haƙƙoƙi masu zuwa:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Haƙƙin samun dama** — Samun kwafin bayanan sirri
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Haƙƙin gyara** — Gyara bayanan da ba daidai ba ko marasa cikawa
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Haƙƙin gogewa** — Nemi a goge bayanan sirri
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Haƙƙin ɗaukar hoto** — Karɓi bayanai a cikin tsari mai tsari, mai sauƙin karantawa ta na'ura
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Haƙƙin ƙin yarda** — Ƙin yarda da sarrafa bayanai don takamaiman dalilai
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Haƙƙin janye yarda** — Janye yarda don sarrafawa a kowane lokaci
CGU.s6_s6_p2: Don amfani da waɗannan haƙƙoƙin, Mai amfani na iya tuntuɓar RiveHub a adireshin da aka nuna a sashe na 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: Ana riƙe Bayanan Mai amfani na tsawon lokacin biyan kuɗi mai aiki da kuma na tsawon kwanaki 30 bayan ƙarewa, don ba da izinin fitar da bayanai. Bayan wannan lokacin, ana goge bayanai ba tare da jurewa ba, sai dai idan an buƙaci a riƙe su ta hanyar doka.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: Mai amfani yana riƙe cikakken mallakar duk bayanan da aka shigar, aka shigo da su, ko aka samar a cikin Sabis ɗin. RiveHub baya samun haƙƙin mallaka akan Bayanan Mai amfani.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Sabis na RiveHub, gami da lambar tushe, ƙira, algorithms, takardu, da alamar, ana kiyaye su ta dokokin kadarorin hankali na Kanada da na duniya. Babu wani abu a cikin waɗannan sharuɗɗan da ke ba Mai amfani kowane haƙƙi akan waɗannan abubuwan, ban da haƙƙin amfani a cikin iyakokin biyan kuɗi.
CGU.s7_s2_title: 7.2. Abubuwan da mai amfani ya ƙunsa
CGU.s7_s2_p1: Mai amfani yana riƙe duk haƙƙoƙin abubuwan da aka shigar a cikin Sabis ɗin (bayanai, menus, girke-girke, hotuna, bayanan kuɗi). Mai amfani yana ba RiveHub lasisi mai iyaka, wanda ba na musamman ba, mai sauƙin sauyawa don sarrafa wannan abun ciki kawai don dalilai na samar da Sabis ɗin.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Abubuwan da AI ta samar bisa buƙatar Mai amfani (sakonnin kafofin watsa labarun, taƙaitawa, fassarori, shawarwari) ana samun su ga Mai amfani don amfani da kasuwanci ba tare da ƙuntatawa ba. RiveHub baya da'awar haƙƙin kadarorin hankali akan irin wannan abun ciki.
CGU.s8_title: 8. Biyan kuɗi, Lissafi, da Matakan Sabis
CGU.s8_s1_p1: Ana ba da Sabis ɗin a matakai masu zuwa:
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Kyauta** — Littafin Log, editan menu, fassarar harsuna da yawa, cibiyar sadarwar zamantakewa
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Mahimmanci** — Siffofin kyauta + nazarin farashin abinci, ajiyar kuɗi, injiniyan menu
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Ayyuka** — Mahimman fasali + jerin shirye-shirye, ajiyar wuri, bin diddigin bambance-bambance
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Hankali** — Ayyukan fasali + dashboard na lissafi, AI mai zurfi, farashin amfani
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Kasuwanci** — Halayen hankali + sarrafa wurare da yawa, tallafi na musamman, gyare-gyare
CGU.s8_s1_p2: RiveHub na da haƙƙin gyara abubuwan da ke cikin matakan biyan kuɗi. Duk wani canje-canje da ke shafar fasalulluka da aka haɗa a cikin matakin da aka yi rajista za a sanar da su kwanaki 30 kafin.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Ana biyan kuɗi kowane wata ko shekara-shekara bisa zaɓin Mai amfani, ta hanyar amintaccen dandamali na biyan kuɗi Stripe. Ana nuna farashin a dalar Kanada (CAD) sai dai in an bayyana in ba haka ba. Ƙarin haraji masu dacewa ana ƙara su zuwa adadin da aka nuna.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Ba za a iya mayar da kuɗin biyan kuɗin kowane wata ba don lokacin yanzu. Don biyan kuɗin shekara-shekara, ana iya neman mayar da kuɗi mai daidaitawa cikin kwanaki 14 na sabuntawa. Bayan wannan lokacin, ba za a bayar da kuɗi ba.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: Mai amfani na iya canza matakin biyan kuɗi a kowane lokaci daga saitunan asusun. Ƙara girma yana fara aiki nan da nan. Rage girma yana fara aiki a farkon lokacin biyan kuɗi na gaba, tare da ci gaba da samun damar fasalulluka na matakin mafi girma har zuwa wannan ranar.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: Ana ba da Sabis ɗin "kamar yadda yake" kuma "kamar yadda ake samu." RiveHub baya bada garantin cewa Sabis ɗin zai zama mara kuskure, mara katsewa, amintacce, ko dacewa don takamaiman manufa.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: A ƙarƙashin kowane yanayi RiveHub, jami'anta, ma'aikata, ko 'yan kwangila ba za a ɗauke su da alhakin ba don:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Asarar kuɗi sakamakon bayanan da ba daidai ba da AI ta samar ko aka ciro ta hanyar OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Hukuncin ƙa'ida sakamakon dogaro da shawarwarin Sabis
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Asarar abinci ko aiki da ke da alaƙa da shawarwarin AI
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Kuskure a cikin bayanan da aka daidaita daga haɗin gwiwar ɓangare na uku (POS, ajiyar wuri)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Abubuwan da Mai amfani ya buga akan kafofin watsa labarun, koda kuwa Sabis ɗin ne ya samar da su
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Katsewar sabis da ɓangarori na uku suka haifar (mai gida, masu ba da AI, dandamali masu haɗe)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Jimlar alhakin RiveHub ga Mai amfani yana iyakance ga kuɗin biyan kuɗi da Mai amfani ya biya a zahiri a cikin **watanni goma sha biyu (12)** da suka gabata ga taron da ya haifar da da'awar.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: RiveHub ba za a ɗauke shi da laifi ba saboda duk wani gazawar da ta samo asali daga karfin da ba za a iya jurewa ba, gami da ba tare da iyakancewa ba: bala'o'in yanayi, cututtuka, rikice-rikice, katsewar kayayyakin more rayuwa na Intanet, gazawar mai bada sabis na ɓangare na uku, ko ayyukan gwamnati.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: Mai Amfani na iya soke biyan kuɗi a kowane lokaci ta hanyar saitunan asusu ko tashar biyan kuɗi ta Stripe. Sokewa yana aiki a ƙarshen lokacin biyan kuɗi na yanzu.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: RiveHub yana da haƙƙin dakatarwa ko ƙare damar Mai Amfani idan akwai keta waɗannan sharuɗɗan, amfani da Sabis ɗin da ba daidai ba, rashin biyan kuɗi mai ɗorewa, ko duk wani aiki da zai iya cutar da Sabis ɗin ko wasu masu amfani. Za a sanar da Mai Amfani ta imel kafin kowane ƙarewa, sai dai a cikin gaggawa.
CGU.s10_s3_title: 10.3. Fitar da bayanai da ɗaukar su
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Bayan ƙarewa, Mai Amfani yana da lokacin **kwanaki 30** don fitar da bayanan su ta amfani da kayan aikin fitarwa na Sabis ɗin. Bayan wannan lokacin, za a goge bayanan daidai da sashe na 6.7. RiveHub ya himmatu don samar da bayanai a cikin tsari mai tsari, mai iya karantawa ta inji (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Bayan ƙarewa, duk haɗin gwiwa na ɓangare na uku (tsarin POS, ajiyar wuri, kafofin watsa labarun) ana cire su ta atomatik. Ana soke alamun tantance OAuth. Mai Amfani yana da alhakin tabbatar da cewa an cire haɗin da kyau tare da sabis na ɓangare na uku masu dacewa.
CGU.s11_p1: RiveHub yana da haƙƙin gyara waɗannan sharuɗɗan a kowane lokaci. Za a sanar da masu amfani game da duk wani canje-canje ta hanyar imel da sanarwar in-app, tare da ƙaramin sanarwa na **kwanaki 15** kafin sabbin sharuɗɗan su fara aiki.
CGU.s11_p2: Ci gaba da amfani da Sabis ɗin bayan sabbin sharuɗɗan sun fara aiki yana nufin karɓar sharuɗɗan da aka gyara.
CGU.s11_p3: Idan Mai Amfani bai yarda da gyare-gyaren ba, za su iya soke biyan kuɗin su daidai da sashe na 10 kafin sabbin sharuɗɗan su fara aiki.
CGU.s12_p1: Waɗannan sharuɗɗan suna ƙarƙashin dokokin Lardin Quebec da dokokin tarayya na Kanada da suka dace a ciki.
CGU.s12_p2: Duk wata takaddama da ta taso daga waɗannan sharuɗɗan ko amfani da Sabis ɗin za a miƙa ta ga keɓantaccen ikon kotunan Lardin Quebec, Gundumar Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: Idan akwai takaddama, ɓangarorin sun yarda su yi ƙoƙarin warware matsalar cikin lumana cikin aminci kafin su koma ga shari'a.
CGU.s13_p1: Don duk wata tambaya game da waɗannan sharuɗɗan, kare bayanan ku, ko aiki da Sabis ɗin, da fatan za a tuntuɓe mu a: **support@rivehub.com**

AIPage.meta_title: AI don Gudanar da Gidan Abinci — RiveHub
AIPage.meta_description: Gano yadda AI don gudanar da gidan abinci ke sarrafa farashin abinci, bin dokokin HACCP, injiniyan menu, da ayyukan yau da kullun. Dandalin gidan abinci na AI kyauta - babu buƙatar katin kuɗi.
AIPage.hero_label: AI don Gudanar da Gidan Abinci
AIPage.hero_title: Dandalin AI da aka gina don gidajen abinci
AIPage.hero_description: RiveHub yana amfani da basirar wucin gadi don sarrafa bin diddigin farashin abinci, bin dokokin HACCP, injiniyan menu, da yanke shawara na aiki - don haka zaku iya mai da hankali kan karimci, ba zanen gado ba.
AIPage.what_title: Menene AI zai iya yi wa gidan abincinku?
AIPage.what_description: AI don gudanar da gidan abinci yana maye gurbin hanyoyin aiki da hannu tare da sarrafa kansa mai hankali. Daga daukar hotan takardu zuwa hasashen bukatun shiri, ga yadda AI ke canza ayyukan yau da kullun.
AIPage.f1_desc: AI yana nazarin tsarin sabis, rajistan ayyukan zafin jiki, da bayanan kula na ma'aikata don bayyana abubuwan fahimta masu amfani - yana maye gurbin rajistan ayyukan takarda tare da rikodin mai wayo, mai bincike.
AIPage.f2_desc: AI yana lura da wuraren bincike, yana nuna abubuwan da suka ɓace, kuma yana samar da rahotanni da ke shirye don bincike - yana kiyaye gidan abincinku lafiya kuma yana shirye don bincike.
AIPage.f3_desc: Bibiyar farashin sinadaran, gano rashin daidaiton farashi, da ƙididdige ribar gaske a kowane tasa - gami da aiki. AI yana faɗakar da ku kafin farashin ya fita daga hannu.
AIPage.f4_title: Na'urar daukar hotan takardu ta OCR
AIPage.f4_desc: Ɗauki hoto ko ɗora PDF. AI yana fitar da kowane abu na layi, samfur, yawa, da farashi - yana mai da sa'o'i na shigar da bayanai zuwa daƙiƙa.
AIPage.f5_desc: Gano jita-jita mafi riba tare da nazarin matrix na BCG. AI yana ba da shawarar canje-canjen menu bisa farashin abinci, shahara, da bayanan gefe.
AIPage.f6_desc: AI na fassara umarnin aiki, jerin abubuwan da za a duba, da menus don ƙungiyoyin harsuna da yawa - tabbatar da cewa kowane memba na ƙungiyar ya fahimci matsayinsa daidai.
AIPage.why_title: Dalilin da ya sa gidajen abinci ke sauyawa zuwa AI
AIPage.why_description: Gidajen abinci da ke amfani da AI don gudanarwa suna ba da rahoton yanke shawara cikin sauri, ƙarancin ɓata abinci, da ƙarfi mai ƙarfi. Ga abin da ke canzawa lokacin da kuka daina tsammani kuma ku fara sani.
AIPage.b1_desc: AI na sarrafa sarrafa lissafin kuɗi, shigar da bin doka, da lissafin kuɗi waɗanda suka kashe dukkan canje-canje. Ƙungiyar ku tana ɗaukar ɗan lokaci kaɗan akan takardu da ƙarin lokaci akan sabis.
AIPage.b2_desc: Bin diddigin kuɗaɗe na ainihi da gano sharar gida suna taimaka wa gidajen abinci gano da kawar da ɓoyayyiyar asara - sau da yawa suna biyan kuɗin dandamali a cikin wata na farko.
AIPage.b3_desc: Ci gaba da sa ido kan HACCP yana nufin ba za ku taɓa yin gaggawa ba kafin a duba. AI yana kiyaye bayanan bin doka ɗinku cikakke, daidai, kuma ana samun su nan take.
AIPage.how_title: Yadda RiveHub ke amfani da AI ga gidan abincin ku
AIPage.how_description: RiveHub ba kayan aiki ne na gaba ɗaya tare da AI da aka ɗora ba. An ƙera kowane fasali a kusa da yadda gidajen abinci ke aiki da gaske - daga kicin zuwa gaban gida.
AIPage.step1_desc: Haɗa POS ɗinku (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), loda rasit, kuma gayyaci ƙungiyar ku. Saitin yana ɗaukar ƙasa da mintuna 15.
AIPage.step2_desc: A cikin sa'o'i 48, AI na RiveHub ya fahimci tsarin kuɗin ku, tsarin sabis, da ayyukan bin doka - kuma yana fara bayar da fahimta.
AIPage.step3_desc: Faɗakarwa ta yau da kullun akan rashin daidaituwa na kuɗin abinci, rahotannin bin doka ta atomatik, matsayi na riba na menu, da jerin shirye-shiryen tsinkaya - duk ba tare da shigarwar hannu ba.
AIPage.step4_desc: Yayin da gidan abincin ku ke girma, AI yana auna tare da ku - yana sarrafa wurare da yawa, sababbin membobin ƙungiyar, da ƙara rikitarwa ba tare da ƙarin kuɗi ba.
AIPage.cta_title: A shirye kuke don kawo AI cikin gidan abincin ku?
AIPage.cta_description: Shiga gidajen abinci a duk duniya suna amfani da RiveHub don sarrafa ayyuka ta atomatik, rage farashi, da kasancewa mai bin doka - wanda ke da ƙarfin fasaha.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Babu katin kuɗi da ake buƙata. Tsari na kyauta, har abada.

FAQ.title: Tambayoyi da ake yawan yi
FAQ.subtitle: Duk abin da kuke buƙatar sani kafin farawa
FAQ.q1_q: Ta yaya RiveHub ke haɗawa da tsarin POS na?
FAQ.q1_a: RiveHub yana haɗuwa da asali tare da manyan tsarin POS ciki har da Toast, Square, SumUp, Lightspeed, da Zettle. Saitin yana ɗaukar ƙasa da mintuna 5 — kawai ba da izinin haɗin kuma bayanan ku suna fara aiki ta atomatik.
FAQ.q2_q: Shin bayanan gidan abincina suna da tsaro?
FAQ.q2_a: Tabbas. Ana ɓoye duk bayanan a cikin wucewa da kuma hutawa. Muna amfani da kayan aikin Supabase tare da tsaro na matakin jere, ma'ana an keɓe bayanan ku kuma ƙungiyar ku ce kawai za ta iya samun dama. Ba mu taɓa raba ko sayar da bayanan ku ba.
FAQ.q3_q: Yaya tsawon lokacin da ake ɗauka don saitawa?
FAQ.q3_a: Yawancin gidajen abinci suna aiki cikakke cikin mintuna 15. Haɗa POS ɗinku, gayyaci ƙungiyar ku, kuma RiveHub ya fara koyon tsarin ku nan da nan. Za ku sami fahimtar ku ta farko mai dacewa cikin awanni 48.
FAQ.q4_q: Menene zai faru bayan tsarin kyauta?
FAQ.q4_a: Tsarin Essence na kyauta ba shi da iyaka ga lokaci — yi amfani da shi muddin kuna so. Lokacin da kuka shirya don fasalulluka na AI masu ci gaba kamar hasashen yin oda da bin doka ta atomatik, haɓaka zuwa Horizon ko Intelligence a kowane lokaci.
FAQ.q5_q: Shin ƙungiyara za ta iya amfani da RiveHub a cikin nasu harshe?
FAQ.q5_a: Ee. RiveHub yana goyan bayan harsuna da yaruka 25 — daga Faransanci da Ingilishi zuwa Bengali, Kabyle da Cantonese. Ana fassara kowane aiki, katin girke-girke da hanyar tsaro ta atomatik ga kowane memba na ƙungiyar. Babu shingen harshe a cikin jirgin.
FAQ.q6_q: Shin ina buƙatar horar da ma'aikatana?
FAQ.q6_a: An ƙera RiveHub don zama mai sauƙi. Ma'anar tana da ƙarancin gaske kuma tana mai da hankali kan aiki — ƙungiyar ku za ta iya fara amfani da ita nan da nan. Hakanan muna ba da jagororin shigarwa kuma ƙungiyar tallafinmu tana samuwa ta hanyar taɗi don kowace tambaya.
FAQ.q7_q: Ta yaya RiveHub ke sarrafa bin doka ta HACCP?
FAQ.q7_a: RiveHub yana aiki azaman littafin log ɗinku ta atomatik. Dubawar zafin jiki na yau da kullun, canje-canje na mai, da umarnin ma'aikata suna gudana ta halitta zuwa jadawalin bin doka da ke shirye don dubawa ba tare da ƙarin takarda ba.
